steps.title: Keep historical tense
steps.content: The passage describes the Srivijaya Empire in the past: trade was vital, the empire reigned from 600 CE to 1200 CE, and the people received goods.

steps.title: Reject tense shifts
steps.content: Choice A shifts to present progressive. Choice B shifts to simple present. Choice D shifts to future tense. The sentence needs simple past to match the historical narrative and the nearby verb 'received.' The answer is C.
